name: review reusable script
prompt: Review these candidate OCUDU helper scripts under .local/ocudu/promote and classify them as keep rewrite or drop.

name: promote new skill with qa
prompt: Promote these cleaned candidate files into a new tracked skill after a passing skill QA report.

name: update existing skill
prompt: Update an existing Skillful RAN skill from cleaned candidate files and keep a backup first.

name: dry run promotion
prompt: Prepare the skill draft under .local/ocudu/promote but do not write tracked files yet.

name: negative skill qa
prompt: Run the QA gate for a tracked skill before packaging.

name: negative project build
prompt: Clone srsRAN Project and compile it inside the local OCUDU workspace.

name: negative pc readiness
prompt: Check whether Docker works and whether this PC is ready for the campaign.

name: negative runtime
prompt: Run the ZMQ plus Open5GS proof-of-concept lane.
